title: GATEWAY HOME
body: Shows system health, active projects, tag counts, connection status, and quick links. Get familiar with the left navigation menu.
code:
Gateway Web UI Sections:
  Status     → Overview, Connections, Tags, Alarms
  Config     → Networking, Projects, OPC, DB, Tags
  Security   → Users, Roles, Auth Profiles
  System     → Modules, Backup, Licensing

Left nav is your map. Learn it.
key: Config is where you add connections
mistakes: Ignoring the Status page (it tells you when things break)
Not exploring the navigation before diving in
